---
name: Backend request
about: Request support for a new medium, MCU, or runtime backend
title: "[backend] "
labels: enhancement, backend
assignees: ""
---

## Target
Describe the medium, MCU, or runtime to support.

## Required contract
List the read/write/erase semantics, alignment rules, program unit, sync behavior, and timeout expectations.

## Validation
State the protocol tests, hardware tests, or emulation tests that should pass.

## Notes
Include constraints such as byte-writable media, erase-before-write flash, RTOS integration, or file-backed simulation.
